text.p: How was your trip back home? i hope it was smooth? thanks for ur visit and the chance to meeting you. the meeting was enriching. i am the man working on sociolinguistic study of word stress for my PhD at Obafemi Awolowo University, ile-ife. Thanks for ur contribution to the discussion on the thesis
I write to remind you about the paper on ur last seminar you promised to send to me.
i am waiting eagerly to receiving the text. thanks for the software made available to me also. may god enrich you the more.
